---
title: "Tools"
description: "Browser-based tools that run entirely client-side. No data leaves your browser."
sidebar: false
toc: true
---

A collection of free, browser-based utilities. Everything runs locally in your browser.

## Image Tools

::: {.tools-grid}

::: {.tool-card}
::: {.tool-name}
[Image Format Converter](image-converter.html)
:::
::: {.tool-desc}
Convert images between PNG, JPEG, and WebP with adjustable quality and transparency handling.
:::
:::

:::

::: {.template-credit}
*Inspired by [tools.simonwillison.net](https://tools.simonwillison.net/).*
:::
